title: [packit] Propose downstream failed for release v1.40.0
body:
Packit failed on creating pull-requests in dist-git (https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/buildah.git):
dist-git brancherror
f41See https://dashboard.packit.dev/jobs/propose-downstream/16750
You can retrigger the update by adding a comment (`/packit propose-downstream`) into this issue.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
